name: radically-happy
description: Phakchok Rinpoche and Erric Solomon's Radically Happy — combine Buddhist wisdom with practical psychology to understand your mind, overcome negative patterns, and cultivate genuine lasting happiness
useCase: Helps anyone train their mind for genuine happiness through meditation, emotional awareness, pattern recognition, and compassion — based on Buddhist mind training (lojong) adapted for modern life.
knownRisks: The book draws on Buddhist teachings — users should approach with respect for the tradition
Meditation and mind training require consistent practice for results
